wins_analysis: No wins today — no positions hit their targets. Both SBIN and KOTAKBANK remain open, suggesting entries were reasonable but price action was insufficient to reach targets within the day. The trending_up regime should favor these BUY positions if momentum continues tomorrow.
losses_analysis: No losses today — no stops were hit. This is a positive signal that entries were placed at structurally sound demand zones with appropriate stop-loss levels. The lack of SL hits in a +0.9% Nifty session confirms zone quality is adequate even at slightly lower scores (47/60 for WIPRO).
regime_impact: The trending_up regime with ADX=25 and VIX=11.8 provided a supportive environment — no stops hit and positions remain safely open. However, the +0.9% broad market move did not translate into target hits for SBIN or KOTAKBANK, suggesting these positions may need wider targets or the individual stocks lagged the index. Demand zone BUY strategy fits this regime well but individual stock momentum varies.

improvements.action: For SBIN and KOTAKBANK open positions, trail stops to breakeven if price reaches 60% of the entry-to-target range during tomorrow's session
improvements.reason: Both positions survived a full day without hitting SL or target — locking in breakeven protects capital while allowing runners in the ongoing uptrend

improvements.action: Increase position scanning to identify 3-5 setups by adding stocks showing relative strength vs Nifty (outperforming by >0.3% on trending_up days) even if zone score is 45-50
improvements.reason: Only 1 setup found today (WIPRO) despite a strong trending regime — the bot is too restrictive on setup count, missing opportunities in favorable conditions

improvements.action: For WIPRO pending order at ₹174.30, keep the limit order active only for the first 90 minutes of tomorrow's session; cancel if not filled by 10:45 IST
improvements.reason: Pending orders that linger lose their edge as zone relevance decays — if price doesn't pull back to the demand zone early in a trending day, it likely won't

improvements.action: When VIX < 12 and ADX >= 25, extend target multiplier from 3R to 3.5R on new entries to capture larger trend moves
improvements.reason: Low VIX means reduced whipsaw risk and trending conditions support wider targets — SBIN and KOTAKBANK may be held back by conservative targets relative to the trend strength

improvements.action: Add sector rotation filter: prioritize IT sector (WIPRO, INFY, TCS) and Banking (SBIN, KOTAKBANK) only if their sectoral index is also trending_up with ADX > 20
improvements.reason: Having 2 banking positions plus 1 IT setup creates concentration risk — verifying sector-level trend confirmation ensures individual stock entries align with sector momentum, not just Nifty

tomorrow_focus: Monitor SBIN and KOTAKBANK for target hits in early session momentum — if Nifty continues trending_up with VIX < 12, these should reach targets; also watch if WIPRO pulls back to ₹174.30 entry zone within first 90 minutes.

symbol_notes.KOTAKBANK: Open BUY position held well — similar to SBIN, trail to breakeven at ₹398 if price reaches ₹404; both banking names should benefit if Bank Nifty continues uptrend
